Library

Dogus University Library and Documentation Center

is an important reference center for students, academic staff, administrative staff and other universities with its data sources. With electronic library services, researchers
    from Turkey and from various parts of the world, also students access to information and documentation.

At

Dogus University

, the library is accepted as the "

heart of the university

" and its activities and developments are supported   with this understanding. All kinds of printed, electronic, audio-visual
    information sources are provided in line according to needs of users. Information resources as hard copy are presented to the public with the shelf system. Information resources in the electronic platform can be used by the multimedia computer lab
    in the library and people can use their own laptops by remote access.
